title: The Watcher (Origins)
description: A passive observer, or a elusive combatant, your choice
body:
- 🟢 Watch: You can slip into the cracks of reality becoming intangible, but unable to interact with the world allowing you to observe those around you in peace.
- 🟢 All Seeing: With concentration, you can see all entities around you.
- 🔴 Barely Real: You don't gain armour or armour toughness from armour.
- 🔴 Fragile: You take 2x damage from all sources.
- 🔴 Shield?: What is a shield?
